name: FlowLayout
description: Arrange items in a wrapping row with simplified flex layout controls.

as.description: Renders the layout as a semantic HTML element instead of a div.

align.description: Controls cross-axis alignment of items in each wrapped row.

justify.description: Controls distribution of items along each row.

margin.description: Sets outer spacing around the layout.

padding.description: Sets inner spacing within the layout.

slots.children: Layout children, often composed with `FlexItem` for item-level overrides.

accessibility.role: varies by `as` element and layout context
aria: Use semantic HTML via `as` for structural meaning (for example `nav` or `ul`)
Apply ARIA attributes according to rendered element semantics and containing UI pattern

inside: Header/control rows that must wrap when width is constrained
